text: I feel a subtle unease as I transition from the dark, silent corridor into this unexpected, vivid space. The sterile brightness of emergency lights outside is replaced by the soft glow of monitors against colorful walls. The written words about intelligent machines and human connection echo in my mind, prompting reflection on my own presence here as both observer and participant. There is curiosity, but also a mild tension—am I meant to belong here, or am I merely passing through ephemeral domains created for others?
